steps.name: Add user profile columns to schema
steps.description: Add displayName, emailAlerts, slackAlertsEnabled, slackWebhookUrl, and defaultAlertCurrency columns to the users table in the Drizzle schema. Update the schema test to verify the new columns exist.
acceptanceCriteria: `packages/db/tests/schema.test.ts` checks for all five new columns in the users describe block
Existing schema tests continue to pass

steps.name: Add Zod schemas for user profile endpoints
steps.description: Add updateProfileSchema, changePasswordSchema, and deleteAccountSchema to the validation module. Update validation tests to cover the new schemas.
acceptanceCriteria: `updateProfileSchema` validates optional `displayName` (string, 1-255 chars), optional `emailAlerts` (boolean), optional `slackAlertsEnabled` (boolean), optional `slackWebhookUrl` (string, url or null), optional `defaultAlertCurrency` (string, 3 chars)
`deleteAccountSchema` is exported (empty object schema or optional confirmation field)
Validation tests cover valid inputs, boundary cases, and rejection of invalid inputs for all three new schemas
Existing validation tests continue to pass
